Geoffrey
  • Build Log

About

Geoffrey is a 1962 Renault Dauphine I picked up from a local farm. The goal is a sympathetic restoration: get it mechanically sound, address the rust properly, and drive it. No trailer queen. This site is my public build log — a place to document the work, the mistakes, and the occasional small victory.

Built with Astro and Keystatic.

Geoffrey — 1962 Renault Dauphine · Edit content
